data.title: BMI Investigation: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) Investors to Contact the Firm
data.description: Investigating potential violations of federal securities laws, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a renowned securities litigation law firm, is looking into Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE: BMI) on behalf of investors. The investigation is focused on determining if Badger Meter breached federal securities laws. Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a nationally recognized firm, is known for handling high-profile securities litigation cases and ensuring justice for investors.

data.title: The Brock Group Expands Southeast Footprint with Strategic Acquisition of Florida-Based Scaffolding Business
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Houston, The Brock Group, a top provider of specialty industrial services, revealed the purchase of a prominent scaffolding company with five branches in significant urban areas in Florida. These locations include Fort Myers, Orlando, Pompano Beach.

data.title: College Decision Day Is Here: What Students and Families Should Know About Paying for College
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, high school seniors nationwide are marking College Decision Day by finalizing their choice of college for the upcoming fall semester. Apart from considering the academic aspects, families are particularly focused on the financial implications and future prospects of this decision. Affordability is a crucial deciding factor for many, with costs playing a key role in college selection. However, the decision also encompasses aspects like overall fit and potential outcomes post-graduation. This process is not solely about choosing where to study but also about assessing the broader implications for long-term success.

data.title: Los Angeles Mayor Tours ECHELON Studios Hollywood Site, Advancing Shared Vision for Keeping Hollywood in Hollywood
data.description: In Los Angeles on May 1, 2026, ECHELON Studios Hollywood Founder David Simon hosted Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass for an exclusive preview and tour of the city's latest purpose-built studio and creative complex. The event highlighted their joint dedication to maintaining the city's entertainment industry.

data.title: Dominion Energy Sees 'Durable' Data Center Demand
data.description: Dominion Energy Inc. (NYSE: D) released its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with GAAP earnings at 69 cents per share, a decrease from the previous year's 77 cents. In contrast, operating earnings improved to 95 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 91 cents. Variances between GAAP and operating earnings were influenced by mark-to-market impacts and a $194 million net market loss, in addition to a $78 million solar impairment charge, a $120 million weather impact, and a $58 million offshore wind-related benefit. Revenue saw a significant growth of about 23% to $5.019 billion from $4.076 billion, exceeding the $4.512 billion estimates. Net income declined to $621 million from $665 million, while operating earnings increased to $847 million from $803 million. Income from operations rose to $1.392 billion. Furthermore, Dominion Energy Virginia was highlighted for its segment performance.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Dr. Andrew Wondra as a 2026 Pinnacle Lifetime Member
data.description: In Boynton Beach, Florida, as of May 1, 2026, Dr. Andrew Wondra has gained recognition as a distinguished 2026 Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his work in personalized patient-focused care in the field of interventional pain medicine. Dr. Wondra's dedication and expertise have been highlighted in this prestigious achievement.

data.title: Kōloa Rum Appoints Robert Ramer as COO
data.description: Kōloa Rum Company in Kalaheo, Kaua'i, Hawaii, disclosed on May 1, 2026, the promotion of Robert Ramer as the Chief Operating Officer, filling the position of the former leader Bob Gunter. Known for crafting high-quality Hawaiian rum in small batches, the company is in the midst of a growth phase. This change in leadership marks a significant moment for the company as it continues to expand.

data.title: Stroke Recovery Event: Support, Resources, and Inspiration at Adler Aphasia Center
data.description: A Stroke Recovery Event focused on providing support, resources, and inspiration will be held by the Adler Aphasia Center in Maywood, NJ on May 14th, 2026, from 4:30 pm to 7:00 pm. The event will allow visitors to engage with a variety of over 25 organizations offering relevant programs and assistance.

data.title: Deluxe Recognized With CIO 100 Award for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: In Minneapolis, Foundry’s CIO has recognized Deluxe (NYSE: DLX) as one of the top 100 companies for the third time since 2024. The prestigious CIO 100 list highlights organizations leveraging technology to enhance revenue, efficiency, and customer results. Deluxe, a leading Payments and Data company with nearly 40 years of experience, stood out for its effective transition of operations from an outdated mainframe system. This acknowledgment reflects Deluxe’s commitment to driving tangible business impact through technological innovation.

Family Counseling Expert provides valuable insights in the HelloNation article on navigating these challenging situations.

Try This Home Prep Checklist" offers guidance on steps sellers should take before listing a home to appeal to serious buyers and secure strong offers. data.title: In HelloNation, Dog Daycare Expert Annette Caporusso Details Dog Daycare Cost in Eau Claire and What Drives Pricing Differences
data.description: In Eau Claire, Wisconsin on May 1, 2026, a recent study on dog daycare pricing sheds light on crucial factors influencing costs for pet owners. This analysis aims to assist in budgeting appropriately and selecting the optimal facility for their pets. The study delves into the average cost of dog daycare services in Eau Claire, revealing a range spanning from $25 to $50 per day. Variances in pricing are driven by factors such as the facility's amenities, staff qualifications, location, and additional services offered. Understanding these determinants can empower pet owners to make informed decisions when choosing a daycare center for their beloved animals.

data.title: In HelloNation, Dog Daycare Expert Annette Caporusso Outlines the Dog Daycare Daily Schedule at Professional Facilities
data.description: Located in Woodbury, Minnesota, a recent piece by HelloNation explores the structured daily routine that shapes the experience of dogs at professional daycare facilities. The article delves into the specifics of a typical day for enrolled dogs, from morning drop-off to afternoon pickup. Presented on May 1, 2026, the piece sheds light on this structured routine which aims to cater to the needs of furry attendees. To learn more about what this entails, including key timestamps and activities, check out the HelloNation article.
